allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host ''; Get-Process claude* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Write-Host '=== Python processes ==='
Get-Process python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

Write-Host '=== Claude processes ==='
Get-Process claude*, 'Claude Code*', 'node*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize

Write-Host '=== All CC-related ==='
Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.ProcessName -match 'claude|node|terminal|cmd|powershell|bash' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Write-Host '=== VS Code extensions \(AI-related\) ==='
Get-ChildItem \\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -match 'cline|copilot|cody|continue|codegpt|deepseek|anthropic|openai|ai|gpt|llm' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\"  \\$\(\\$_.Name\)\\" }

Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Cursor/Windsurf IDE? ==='
Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.ProcessName -match 'cursor|windsurf' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName

Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Browser processes? ==='
Get-Process chrome*, msedge*, firefox*, brave* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize

Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Any docker/container services? ==='
Get-Process docker*, 'com.docker*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName

Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Check npm global packages for AI tools ==='
npm list -g --depth=0 2>\\$null | Select-String 'claude|cline|anthropic|deepseek|ai|copilot'
")
